noSchedule: No schedule yet. Tap ↻ to generate.
chatEmpty: Describe this task — what needs to happen, any constraints?
chatStarter1: Help me break this down into steps
chatStarter2: How long will this realistically take?

morningCheckInSub: Log sleep to get a personalised energy curve
shortcutsGuideTitle: One-tap Apple Watch import from iPhone
shortcutsGuideSub: 'Get Health Samples' is iPhone-only. Make sure iPhone and Mac are on the same WiFi.
shortcutsUrlLabel: Copy this URL into your iPhone Shortcut
shortcutsStep1: On iPhone, open Shortcuts → New Shortcut
shortcutsStep2: Search 'Get Health Samples' — add: Sleep Analysis (last 1 day), Resting Heart Rate, HRV, Step Count
shortcutsStep3: Add 'Get Contents of URL', paste the URL above; replace each placeholder with the matching sample value
shortcutsStep4: Add shortcut to Home Screen widget or lock screen — tap every morning to sync
noSleepDataSub: Tap to log sleep and get a smarter energy curve
unscheduledSub: These tasks had no remaining slot — they'll roll to tomorrow
